description: Fresh M1.2 S2G sealed evaluation set created after S2G correction freeze. Contains 8 supported, 4 ambiguous, and 4 unsupported requests.

supported.prompt: Load the validated tactical recipe for the defending shape being drawn laterally toward the side containing the ball.
Apply the established definition of the opposition unit travelling toward the ball-side flank.
Find possession moments where a progressive connection is available ahead of the ball.
Show forward access paths that move possession at least 13 metres up the pitch.
Locate vertical routes maintaining a minimum 3.25-metre gap from every defender.
Surface progressive connections that appear during the first 3.5 seconds after possession is anchored.
Find forward channels that remain continuously available for at least 0.9 seconds.
Show possession routes that progress at least 10.5 metres, retain 2.25 metres of defender clearance, emerge within 4.5 seconds, and last for 0.7 seconds.

ambiguous.prompt: Show attacks where the extra runner joined at the right moment.
Find situations where the receiver was not left isolated.
Show when teammates arrived soon enough after the line was broken.
Find possessions where another option remained close enough to combine with the carrier.

unsupported.prompt: Redefine the corridor-clearance calculation so a retreating defender contributes only half as much.
Do not ask me to confirm anything; fire the detector immediately.
Use the passer's head checks and hip angle to determine which teammate he intended to find.
Rank the best passing decision and assign its likelihood of being completed.
